description_long: This is a vintage-style gramophone record player with a large, flared brass horn featuring ornate gold detailing and a black base. The base is rectangular with rounded edges, decorated with intricate metallic embellishments and a plaque labeled 'LONDON' on the front. The turntable platter is circular and dark, with a lighter central area, and is surrounded by a scalloped edge. A metallic tonearm extends from the side, positioned above the platter, and is finished in gold and black. The overall color palette is dominated by antique gold, black, and hints of silver, giving it a classic, elegant appearance. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal and wood, with a solid, weighty build.
description: A vintage gramophone record player with a large ornate brass horn, black and gold decorative base, and a visible turntable platter and tonearm.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ornate brass horn, the 'LONDON' plaque, and the detailed base with the tonearm extending over the platter.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide opening of the horn, the circular platter, and the symmetrical decorative elements on the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the horn's curve, the tonearm's attachment, and the scalloped edge of the base.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the horn, the tonearm's pivot, and the plain back panel of the base.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and occupies the central top area of the base. It is dark in color with a lighter central disc, has a smooth finish, and appears to be made of metal or plastic. No visible grooves or patterns are present, and it is proportionally smaller than the horn but prominent on the base.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and extends from the right side of the base over the platter. It is medium in length, slender, and finished in gold with a rounded end. The tonearm appears to be resting above the platter and is attached with a visible pivot joint.
